sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42038" key="e(/ptusxlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἕπτ-υσχλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οξ</itype>, <sense id="n42038.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sandal laced with seven straps,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕσχλος, ἐννήυσκλοι, πτύσχλοι.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
